Lead.title: Lead
Lead.description: Represents a potential client who has submitted their information through the landing page.

email.description: The email address of the lead.

phone.description: The phone number of the lead.

message.description: The message or inquiry submitted by the lead.

submissionDate.description: The date and time the lead submitted their information.

CaseStudy.title: CaseStudy
CaseStudy.description: Represents a successful e-commerce project with quantifiable results.

id.description: Unique identifier for the case study.

title.description: The title of the case study.

description.description: A brief overview of the project and the client's goals.

results.description: Quantifiable results achieved in the project.

imageUrl.description: URL of the image associated with the case study.

Testimonial.title: Testimonial
Testimonial.description: Represents a quote from a satisfied client.

author.description: The name of the client giving the testimonial.

authorTitle.description: The title of the client giving the testimonial.

/leads/{leadId}.description: Collection for storing leads submitted through the landing page.

/case_studies/{caseStudyId}.description: Collection for storing case studies. Publicly readable, admin-only management.

/testimonials/{testimonialId}.description: Collection for storing testimonials. Publicly readable, admin-only management.

/roles_admin/{uid}.description: Collection used to store admin roles. The existence of a document in this collection grants admin privileges.
